component.name: Kvit Notes
component.summary: Native markdown block editor with live preview, math, and diagrams

description.p: Kvit Notes is a native C++/Qt markdown notes app. Text renders as you write, and markdown syntax reveals itself only where the cursor is. It stores everything as plain markdown files in ordinary folders.

ul.li: Hybrid live-preview editing: syntax hides when rendered, reveals at the cursor
A full block palette: headings, lists, todos, quotes, code, tables, kanban boards, callouts, toggles, images, media, embeds
Mermaid diagrams rendered natively, editable by dragging on the diagram
ASCII-diagram repair for pasted terminal art
A notes collection with folders, tags, global full-text search, wiki-links, and backlinks
Export to HTML, PDF, and plain text
No telemetry, no accounts, no database: files are the truth

screenshot.caption: The three-pane shell with live-preview editing
